name: Script Restart Checker
description: Monitors a Shelly script and automatically restarts it if it crashes

description_lng.de: Überwacht ein Shelly-Skript und startet es automatisch neu, falls es abstürzt

author: TheSolarApp

parameters.name: TARGET_SCRIPT_NAME
parameters.label: Target Script Name
parameters.description: Name of the script to monitor (e.g., __auto_zendure-power-control-ip_2.0.0_a1b2c3d4)
